failedAssertions.reason: Direct grant_token query flow for /api/views/night is not reachable on this surface (401 Authentication is required despite valid token).
Viewer response was not properly clamped/scoped
Correlation computation is not implemented in trend response (always empty array even when requested).
grant_token direct viewer access to /api/views/trend is blocked by 401 (real surface), so viewer grant_token scoping behavior cannot be observed through the expected entry path.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Assertion-specific raw at-rest parse-failure evidence for metric_baselines.value_encrypted is not directly covered by existing targeted vitest cases.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: curl section with isolation requirements and evidence capture expectations for API-surface validation.

Corrected API auth guidance: use generated __session cookies for owner auth (middleware strips x-request-context), and documented /api/viewer/validate workaround for diagnosing viewer scope when grant_token query path returns 401.
